title: peltophorum tonkinense
intro: Peltophorum tonkinense, also known as the Yellow Flame Tree, is a plant species that belongs to the family Fabaceae. Traditionally, this plant is used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Peltophorum tonkinense include reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating various infections, as well as having potential antioxidant and anti-cancer properties. Herbal preparations of Peltophorum tonkinense are commonly made into teas, infusions, or extracts for medicinal purposes, although the availability and quality of these preparations may vary depending on the region and source.
